local function y(y)return N[y-(-383130-(-445883))]end do local y=string.char local K=N local j=table.concat local v=table.insert local k=type local end return(function(N,j,v,k,i,g,m,P,s,M,d,c,V,R,o,K,q,b,l,H,u,f,h)u,R,l,b,M,q,K,f,H,c,P,V,o,d,s,h=-531989-(-531989),function(N,y)local j=d(y)local v=function()return K(N,{},y,j)end return v vU,W,n,bU,I,C,J,o,F,jU,e,m,E,a,T,l,gU,p,G,w,O,NU,kU,A,Z,S,mU,x,Q,B,X,V,z,t,KU,yU,d,iU,u,r,D,Y,lU,L,U while K do if K<248049+8805693 then if K<907371+3801833 then if K<-742984+3189743 then if
